dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Beep bop skdoo beh..?

dialogue.speaker: gf-remnants
text: Uh... I'm not sure where we are right now.

dialogue.speaker: gf-remnants
text: I feel like we're entering some sort of Uncharted territory.

dialogue.speaker: proto-bf
text: Wait, say that again.

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Oh my god shu- wait...

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Oh my god you're like a Funkin' Remnant.
I love that mod!

dialogue.speaker: proto-bf
text: Oh yeah do you?
Name every Remnant in it!

dialogue.speaker: gf-remnants
text: Uh oh.

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants-comedic
text: The title screen music from the FNF ludum Dare prototype was reused!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The unused combo sprite was restored!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The unused pause graphic was restored in the pause menu!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The Donate and Kickstarter, buttons were brought back!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The unused Goodies! buttons was restored!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The unused backspace graphic was restored in the menus!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The GF jiggle easter egg uses Kawai Sprite's older version of the song!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The Input Offsets menu uses KadeDev's older version of the song!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: BF & GF's game overs are based off of their old concepts!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The unused lose graphic was restored when you game over!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: BF, GF, and Pico's character select sprites reference their old concepts!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: An unused animation of BF transitioning back to idle after his good rank animation was restored!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Although that animation was later added in a patch after the mod came out, so it's technically no longer a Remnant.

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: BF's watching TV animation references a older version of it where hes leaning forward instead of backwards!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Remnants!'s background references an old Week 1 background sketch!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Remnants!'s freeplay album cover references a old concept for FNF's volume 1 vinyl cover!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Remnants Erect!'s intro references a old BF face from the FNF Teaser Video!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Remnants Erect!'s background restores the big top hat guy in the crowd!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Tutorial's bumper uses a old PhantomArcade animation of BF hitting the screen

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: GF's scrapped Tutorial intro was restored!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Bopeebo references an unused FNF song called Give a Lil Bit Back!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: An extra note in Bopeebo on Dad's side was readded!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Fresh's old beatbox charting was referenced!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Scrapped BF and Dad fighting mechanics were restored in DadBattle!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: In Spookeez the Spooky Kids use their old unused idle!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: South's ending cutscene references a unused Monster design!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Monster's left and right poses being reversed were restored!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Week 3's background reuses scrapped props, like the ceiling hatch!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Pico's sprites references an old sketch where there's a mic in his gun barrel!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Week 4's background has some Henchman use their old designs!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Mom's old down and right poses were restored!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: High references an old beta version of it!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Scrapped lamp post mechanics were restored in M.I.L.F!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Winterhorror Land's intro cutscene references a old FNF theory where Monster was hiding inside Santa!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Week 6's normal bumper references a concept for Week 6's intro cutscene!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Senpai & Thorns's dialogue references old FNF Dev Twitter post!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Senpai uses his old unused idle animation!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Roses dialogue uses an unused dialogue sound!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Roses's old charting and scroll speed were referenced!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Senpai's secret dialogue references a old Vinesauce video about Unfair Mario 64!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Thorns's censored dialogue references dialogue from a old Vs Matt corruption fan mod!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Tankman uses his old idle animation along with referencing an old sketch where RAP MAN is said on his shirt!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Week 7's background reuses a ton of scrapped ideas, like the falling tankman and standstorm!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: In Guns there's a chance for Tankman and BF to ascend as a reference to old FNF memes about Tankman ascending during Guns!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: GF face planting during the Stress cutscene was restored as a random chance!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Darnell's scrapped Abot arm was restored!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Darnell's intro cutscene uses Darnell and Nene's old laugh sounds!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Pico's game over retry sound uses the old version!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Pico's unused alternate shooting animation was restored in 2hot!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Pico's perfect results animation reuses Nene's scrapped facial expression when she gets kicked!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: In Blazin' Pico's unused flitch animation was restored!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The OST version of Blazin's ending was restored!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Old test charting songs Smash and Ridge are referenced in Freeplay!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Unused song called SugarCrash! was restored as a playable song!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Remnants (Remnants Mix)'s background and Proto BF & GF reference a very early Week 1 concept!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Proto BF's dialogue sound uses an old unedited version of the note miss sound!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: In Remnants (Remnants Mix) Proto BF's notes are based off of super old place holder note graphics!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Proto BF's hold animations reference how characters used to jitter while hitting hold notes in older FNF versions!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Playtime's background is based off a scrapped Poppy Playtime area outside of the Playtime Co building!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Grieving's flashbacks reference a ton of old FNF sketches!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The credits reuse a unused song called Fresh (Chill Mix)!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The credits reuse a ton of old FNF sketches!

dialogue.speaker: proto-gf
text: Wow.
Who knew Funkin' Remnants had so many Remnants.

dialogue.speaker: proto-gf
text: You'd have to be brain dead to say there wasn't enough!
